title: 18 PCS 6''Stainless Steel Metal Skewers for Kebabs, skewers Stainless Steel, for Air Fryer,Chicken skewers,Turkey Kebabs,BBQ Accessories(18)
features: STRONG AND DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Each Kebab Skewer is made of high quality skewers stainless steel to ensure reliability and reusability for a variety of outdoor grilling, picnic or cooking environments. They are dishwasher safe for easy clean up.

LENGTH AND QUANTITY: The Turkey Skewers for turkey cuttings are 6 inches long, an ideal length for cuttings of a variety of foods. A pack of 18 skewers is more than enough for outdoor and indoor use, making meal prep a breeze.

ENHANCED FLAVOUR & MOISTURE LOCK: Stainless Steel Turkey Skewers Effectively secure turkey or chicken to help retain moisture and flavour. With or without twine, these ties ensure tender, juicy turkey or chicken meat, ideal for kebabs, fruit skewers and crafts.

EASY TO USE: These metal kebab skewers Roast Goose Pins are easy to use - simply clean and season your goose, fill the cavity, and pass them through the meat. The ring at the top ensures a secure grip and easy removal, making meal preparation easy and simple.

HEAT RESISTANT AND REUSABLE: These pull rings can withstand temperatures up to 500°F and can be reused for multiple roasting or grilling sessions. The rugged design ensures years of use and is ideal for the professional chef or home cook.
